title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Panchshil Realty

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Panchshil Realty
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!
